source_label: Hedra — Company / About page (a16z-backed AI video startup behind Character-3)
notes: Hedra AI — a16z-backed digital-human / talking-avatar startup (Character-3 omnimodal model; $32M Series A, May 2025; 10M+ videos generated). Name = Greek 'hedra' (ἕδρα, 'seat/base'), which standalone reads HED-ruh — Behind the Name lists [ˈhɛdrə]. STRESS: HED-ruh. No founder pronunciation on record; the HEE-druh variant (/ˈhiːdrə/) circulates by analogy with compounds like polyHEEdron / dodecaHEEdron, but for the bare name HED-ruh is the dictionary-backed reading. CONTESTED — no official guidance.
